ic50_records.source: Sahu A, Rawal N, Pangburn MK 1999 (PMID 10353266) Biochem Pharmacol 57(12):1439-46

ic50_records.source: Englberger W et al. 1988 (PMID 3198307) Int J Immunopharmacol 10(7):729-37
ic50_records.verification: Cited in wiki/upstream-complement-modulator-sweep-computational.md L33 + complement-c5a-gout.md L58 + L624 as the lower-bound IC50. Abstract-tier; comp-018/comp-020 carry CITATION-CONFIRMED-VIA-WEBSEARCH-SNIPPET flag. Used here as the lower-bound (5-10 μM) of the assay-format spread.

uncertainty_summary: 44× assay-format spread (5 μM lower bound Englberger 1988 → 1500 μM upper bound Sahu 1999 C5 convertase direct). Operative-mechanism IC50 = 34 μM at the C3b deposition step (Sahu 1999). This is the load-bearing number for a fluid-phase + gut-luminal C3 convertase inhibition prediction.
modeling_choice: IC50 distribution = log-uniform [5 μM, 180 μM] for the C3-convertase / C3b-deposition operative-mechanism range. Excludes 1500 μM C5-convertase-direct because that is mechanistically the wrong step. Central tendency = 34 μM (Sahu 1999 cell-based C3b deposition).
